name: TextHorizontalAlignment
summary: Horizontal location of text attach point relative to text

enum_values.name: Left
enum_values.summary: Attach at left of text lines (Independent of glyphs being displayed.)

enum_values.name: Center
enum_values.summary: Attach point at center of text horizontal advance (not glyph bounding box)

enum_values.name: Right
enum_values.summary: Attach point at right text horizontal advance (not glyph bounding box)

enum_values.name: Auto
enum_values.summary: Used for Leaders only Attach point adjusts to Right or Left depending on leader tail direction in view If tail direction is to the Left, alignment is Right If tail direction is to the Right, alignment is Left
